name: Lightbridge Corporation
description: Lightbridge Corporation is an advanced nuclear fuel technology company based in Reston, Virginia. The company is dedicated to developing Lightbridge Fuel™, a proprietary next-generation nuclear fuel technology designed for both current and future reactors. This innovative fuel technology aims to significantly enhance the economics, proliferation resistance, and safety of nuclear power by operating at temperatures approximately 1000 °C cooler than standard fuel. By focusing on these advancements, Lightbridge seeks to provide essential solutions for global energy, climate, and security challenges, positioning itself as a key player in the transition to carbon-free energy applications.
